summary: QuiX Quantum, a Dutch-German provider of photonic quantum computing hardware, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding to join Italy’s Q-Alliance, a consortium that aims to build a quantum computing hub at the National Center “Volta” in Lombardy. This partnership supports Italy's National Strategy for Quantum Technologies and brings QuiX Quantum’s measurement-based, universal photonic quantum computing to Italy’s infrastructure. QuiX Quantum’s technology operates at room temperature, offering scalability and interconnectivity, and complements Italy’s strengths in quantum optics. Q-Alliance, uniting research institutions, companies, and governmental bodies, will support research and application development across industries such as pharmaceuticals, manufacturing, and aerospace. CEO Stefan Hengesbach and Undersecretary Alessio Butti emphasized the collaboration’s significance for strengthening Europe’s quantum ecosystem.
